data.title: Newmark Arranges $1.65 Billion Refinancing of One Madison Avenue in New York City
data.description: The recent transaction signifies the highest office Commercial Mortgage-Backed Securities (CMBS) issuance in the United States within the last year. Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK), a prominent commercial real estate consultant and service firm catering to major institutional investors worldwide, disclosed the news.

data.title: Nodal Exchange Launches the First Financially Settled California Carbon Allowance Futures in Collaboration with IncubEx
data.description: Nodal Exchange, based in Washington, D.C., and IncubEx have joined forces to introduce the inaugural financially settled futures and options contracts for California Carbon Allowances. This marks a significant development in the market, offering traders the opportunity to engage in trading of these instruments.

data.title: Provation Introduces Real-Time, AI-Powered Documentation Assist for GI Procedures
data.description: In Minneapolis, Provation, a renowned clinical productivity software provider, has introduced Provation® Mira Documentation Assist as part of its cloud-based GI procedure software, Provation® Apex. This feature allows real-time structured documentation during procedures through voice commands, minimizing manual data entry and post-procedure recall. By enabling clinicians to document hands-free while speaking, the technology enhances efficiency. This advancement aims to streamline the documentation process and improve overall workflow.

data.title: Oil price fluctuates due to conflicting reports in Middle East negotiations. US-Israel tensions escalate, causing disruption in energy supply.
data.description: Investors are processing mounting indicators of heightened conflict between the United States and Israel in Iran, resulting in a disruption of vital energy resources. The situation has prompted concerns among investors about the potential impact on global markets, as tensions continue to rise.

data.title: Mark Zuckerberg Wealth Suffers Large Fall After Court Rulings: Meta Founder Worth $46 Billion Less In 2026
data.description: In 2026, the Magnificent Seven stocks have faced challenges resulting in major impacts. Specifically, Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) is reducing its workforce and heavily investing in AI expansion. Additionally, the company is dealing with recent legal judgments that may trigger further legal battles. Consequently, Meta's shares have plummeted by 18%, affecting shareholders like co-founder Mark Zuckerberg. At the beginning of the year, Zuckerberg ranked as the sixth wealthiest individual globally, possessing a net worth of $233 billion. Nonetheless, due to Meta's stock decline, his wealth has decreased significantly. While maintaining his sixth position, Zuckerberg's fortune now stands at $187 billion, representing a $46.3 billion drop.

data.title: Skyhawk Therapeutics Announces its Founding Scientific Advisory Board Chairman Receives the American Cancer Society's 2026 Medal of Honor
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Dr. Tyler Jacks, the inaugural chairman of Skyhawk's Scientific Advisory Board, was honored with the prestigious Medal of Honor from the American Cancer Society. This award, established in 1949, recognizes extraordinary dedication in the field of cancer research. Dr. Jacks was lauded for his unwavering efforts in tackling the intricate challenges posed by cancer. This significant achievement highlights his remarkable contributions to the fight against cancer.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: The Ademi Firm investigates whether Kezar Life Sciences, Inc. is obtaining a Fair Price for Public Shareholders
data.description: An investigation is being conducted by Ademi LLP on Kezar (NASDAQ: KZR) in Milwaukee starting on March 30, 2026. Allegations include potential breaches of fiduciary duty and violations of law in the company's recent transaction with Aurinia. Investors are encouraged to participate in the investigation for more information and to understand their rights.

data.title: Marvell, Caterpillar Lead Five Stocks To Watch In Weak Market
data.description: Last week, Marvell's stock showed a strong rally despite pulling back from a buy point amidst a challenging market. Caterpillar, another notable AI stock, also demonstrated resilience. These two companies, Marvell and Caterpillar, alongside three others, are extensively watched in light of the current market conditions. This information was detailed in an article titled "Marvell, Caterpillar Lead Five Stocks To Watch In Weak Market," as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: StackAdapt Named a Strong Performer in Omnichannel Advertising Platforms, Q1 2026 Analyst Evaluation
data.description: A company based in Toronto, StackAdapt, has been recognized as a Strong Performer in The Forrester Wave™ report for Omnichannel Advertising Platforms from Q1 2026. StackAdapt, a leading AI advertising and orchestration platform, received the highest scores in three criteria out of a comprehensive set evaluated in two categories: current offering and strategy, as well as customer feedback. The platform's achievement reflects its strong position in the industry. For more information, visit www.stackadapt.com.

data.title: Press Statement by H.E. Sherif Fathy, Minister of Tourism and Antiquities. Energy saving measures without affecting tourism
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Cairo, H.E. Sherif Fathy, the Minister of Tourism and Antiquities, affirmed that the government's new initiatives to streamline energy usage will come into force on Saturday, March 28. The measures were implemented in light of current global trends, aimed at regulating energy consumption.

data.title: Avalanche Foundation starts round 2 of Retro9000 with 10x multipliers for Build Games grads, 5x for new projects. Apply by Apr 16.
data.description: AVAX's Retro9000 C-Chain initiative enters its second round, offering notable multipliers for participants. Build Games graduates can benefit from a 10x increase, while new projects receive a 5x boost. Interested parties must submit their applications by April 16 to be considered for the program.

data.title: VALLOUREC : Monthly information relating to the total number of voting rights  and shares comprising the share capital
data.description: VALLOUREC is a French public limited company with a Board of Directors and a share capital of €4,768,147.86. The company is headquartered at 12 rue de la Verrerie in Meudon, France. VALLOUREC is registered on the Nanterre Trade and Companies Register under the number 552 142 200.

data.title: Tom Lee Buys More Than 71K ETH, Calls Crypto 'Good Wartime Store Of Value'
data.description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies, listed on NYSE as BMNR, acquired 71,179 ETH last week, increasing their total holdings to 4.73 million ETH valued at $9.8 billion. Chairman Tom Lee described cryptocurrency as a reliable store of value during times of conflict, amidst the situation with Iran. This purchase marks an uptick in Bitmine's weekly buying rate, which typically ranged from 45,000 to 50,000 ETH. Lee expressed optimism that Ethereum (ETH) is nearing the end of a "mini-crypto winter." During the fifth week of the Iran conflict, ETH and cryptocurrencies demonstrated better performance compared to the general market, with ETH surpassing equities by 1,160 basis points. In contrast, traditional safe-haven asset Gold underperformed by over 750 basis points. Lee highlighted the inverse correlation between... (The detailed article can be found on Benzinga.com)
Company buys back 100k of its own shares in latest transaction.
